name: Security Vulnerability Report
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security

---

## IMPORTANT: SECURITY REPORTING

⚠️ **PLEASE DO NOT OPEN PUBLIC ISSUES FOR SECURITY VULNERABILITIES**

Security vulnerabilities should be reported privately. Please email:
**martirod@student.42malaga.com** with "[SECURITY]" in the subject line.

Include in your report:
- Vulnerability description
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected versions
- Suggested fix (if available)

This allows us to address security issues before they become public knowledge.

---

## If You're Opening This Publicly (Not Recommended)

Only proceed if the vulnerability has already been publicly disclosed.

### Vulnerability Type
- [ ] Code Injection
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization bypass
- [ ] Cryptographic weakness
- [ ] Information Disclosure
- [ ] Denial of Service
- [ ] Other (please describe)

### Severity
- [ ] Critical (immediate threat to security)
- [ ] High (significant security impact)
- [ ] Medium (moderate security impact)
- [ ] Low (minor security impact)

### Affected Component
- [ ] Core calculation engine
- [ ] AI interpreter module
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] CLI interface
- [ ] Docker deployment
- [ ] Other

### Description
Detailed description of the vulnerability.

### Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the vulnerability.

### Impact
What impact could this vulnerability have?

### Suggested Fix
If you have a suggested fix, describe it here.

### Additional Information
Any other relevant information.

---

## Thank You!

We appreciate your responsible disclosure and dedication to keeping Astrologico secure. 🙏
